item.title: An Analysis Of the GandCrab V2 Ransomware
item.description: In a university assignment, I was tasked with reversing GandCrab malware.

item.title: Fuzzing FreeImage to uncover vulnerabilities
item.description: Fuzzing FreeImage with American Fuzzy Lop in the hope to uncover vulnerabilities.

item.title: KeepassXC + SyncThing = :heart:
item.description: Learn how to use SyncThing to synchronize KeepassXC databases across devices and regain ownership of your data.
